sections.paragraph: Ch. emphat. state שְׁאֵלְתָּא prop. question, petition; hence anything inquired for, matter, affair, compare חֵפֶץ No. 4, Arab. مَسْأَلَةُ question, matter, affair, see A. Schult., Animadverss. Philol., on this place. Dan 4:14, מֵאמַר קַדּישִׁין שְׁאֵלְתָּא “and this thing is by the command of the holy ones.”
